description.p: XXAR is a mod manager and mod creator for HoYoverse games. It can replace any sound inside Zenless Zone Zero, Genshin Impact and Honkai Star Rail with your own audio — without touching a command line.

ul.li: Mod Manager: install, enable/disable, and reorder audio mods per game
Audio Browser: browse every sound in the game with preview playback
Mod Creator: build your own .zzar / .giar / .srar mod packages
Audio Converter: convert between MP3, WAV, WEM and other formats
Loop point and per-replacement volume editing

description.p: First Flatpak release of XXAR after the fork from ZZAR/SRAR.

ul.li: Single Flatpak bundle now covers all three supported games
Self-update flow uses sideloaded .flatpak bundles from GitHub releases
